channel.title: Trendlyne Latest Market News
channel.description: Latest stock market insights and analyst calls from Trendlyne.

item.title: A new party takes power in West Bengal. Is this the start of a new industrial story?
item.description:
The founding Prime Minister of Singapore, Lee Kuan Yew, once said that he wanted “Singapore to become like Calcutta.” That quote is getting some attention after the Bharatiya Janata Party’s (BJP) swee...

Premium: No

item.title: Market closes higher on reports of possible tax cut on foreign investors’ bond investments
item.description:
Nifty 50 closed at 23,689.60 (277, 1.2%), BSE Sensex closed at 75,398.72 (789.7, 1.1%) while the broader Nifty 500 closed at 22,613.10 (235.8, 1.1%). Market breadth is in the red. Of the 2,738 stocks ...

Premium: No

item.title: Why is the world's fastest growing economy limiting gold buys and international vacations?
item.description:
I was plenty bored during my childhood, which was in the pre-smartphone era. But the most bored I ever got, was when my parents dragged me along with them to the gold store. Budgets were tight, so my ...

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - May 12, 2026
item.description:

item.title: IPO listing pace holds strong: Three more debuts this week after last week's trio
item.description:

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - May 8, 2026
item.description:

item.title: What drove multibaggers in FY26: Order books, commodity cycles and turnaround plays

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - May 6, 2026

item.title: Primary market buzzes as Blackstone-backed REIT and Shark Tank brand Recode launch IPOs

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - April 30, 2026
